full_text:
Zhao Yan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Yan. Sent by his brother to try and get Fu Xie to pay a bribe and he would get rewarded for work against Turbans. Zhao Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
